description:
Advances: mutagen.cli

Deliverable: migrate .spec/specs/cli.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema:
- spec-scenarios block: reshape each scenario to given:/when:/then: arrays (bespoke shape fails parse with 'expected array').
- spec-verification block: replace execute:/source_file: stubs with command: and target: entries; every requirement gets a verification entry.
- spec-meta: flip status: draft -> active once the file validates.
- keep prose, intent, id, surface, and decisions links intact.

Verification:
- mix spec.validate emits ZERO errors for mutagen.cli (baseline: 12 errors on this file).
- subject status is active in .spec/state.json.

Out of Scope (files): every .spec.md EXCEPT cli.spec.md; lib/**; test/**.
Allowed touches: .spec/specs/cli.spec.md only.
Out of Scope (intent): no realized_by bindings (phase2); no code/test edits; do not alter requirement ids or delete requirements.
Merge gate: mix spec.validate (0 errors for mutagen.cli) && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED

Migrated .spec/specs/cli.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema (Phase 1, --impl-only).

Changes:
- spec-scenarios: reshaped given:/when:/then: from scalar strings to arrays (single-element YAML lists, prose preserved verbatim). Fixes the 'expected array' parse_error.
- spec-verification: renamed command: -> target: on all 11 entries (SpecLedEx reads the command from target: for kind: command). No source_file: stubs were present. Every requirement r1-r16 has a covering verification entry; execute: flags kept as authored.
- spec-meta: status: draft -> active.
- Kept prose, intent, ids, surface, and decisions links intact. No requirement ids altered or deleted.

Merge gate (run locally in worktree /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-migrate-cli):
- mix spec.validate -> ZERO errors for subject mutagen.cli (baseline was 12: 1 scenario parse_error + 11 verification_missing_command). Other subjects still error as expected this phase.
- .spec/state.json regenerated by mix spec.validate; subject mutagen.cli shows status: active.
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors -> clean.
- mix test -> 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded).

Commit 2850d11 on branch mutagen-835.2.1/migrate-cli. Allowed touches respected: only .spec/specs/cli.spec.md (modified) and .spec/state.json (regenerated, was untracked) staged.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 2 (.spec/specs/cli.spec.md, .spec/state.json)
- Files outside Allowed globs: 0 (.spec/state.json exempt as generated-state)
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0 (no other *.spec.md, no lib/**, no test/**)

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: 11 listed; 10 with execute:true run (v3 self_mutation is execute:false, not run), passed: 9. v11 (archive_integration) fails on a PRE-EXISTING defect (telemetry.app missing from the generated .ez), not introduced here -- this commit touches zero lib/** or test/** files; the failure reproduces independent of the spec migration.
- Requirements coverage (one line per must requirement):
  - r1: covered by v1 (mix test cli_test.exs). Would fail if --scope accumulation / missing-scope error-JSON broke.
  - r2: covered by v1. Would fail if --tests accumulation / missing-tests error-JSON broke.
  - r3: covered by v1. Would fail if --timeout-ms positive-int validation broke.
  - r4: covered by v1. Would fail if --seed propagation to ExUnit.configure broke.
  - r5: covered by v1. Would fail if --json path-vs-stdout routing/newline broke.
  - r6: covered by v2 (--only exit_codes). Would fail if exit-0-on-success / non-zero-on-bad-input discipline broke.
  - r7: covered by v2. Would fail if --no-json did not emit :flag_not_supported_in_v1 + non-zero exit.
  - r8: covered by v3 (execute:false, self_mutation). Coverage is declared but not executed this run; the e2e self-mutation refusal path is asserted in cli_test exit_codes-adjacent specs but the dedicated stub is opt-out. Adequate for a Phase-1 spec-authoring migration (no code change to r8 behaviour).
  - r9: covered by v4 (mix help mutagen exits 0). Would fail if the task help/docs section broke. (priority: should)
  - r10: covered by v5 (json_path_test + cli_test). Would fail if NUL/.. parse-time refusal or symlink-escape canonicalisation broke.
  - r11: covered by v6 (--only tag_charset). Would fail if the tag:NAME charset gate stopped rejecting bad names.
  - r12: covered by v7 (cli_test + mutation_enumerator_test). Would fail if the 100-occurrence cap or --max-sites validation broke.
  - r13: covered by v8 (mutation_runner_test + cli_test). Would fail if --budget-ms truncation/validation broke.
  - r14: covered by v9 (downstream_adoption --include downstream_integration; PASSED). Would fail if the run/1 preamble (loadpaths/compile/ensure_all_started/ExUnit.start) broke for a dep-style downstream.
  - r15: covered by v10 (--only unsafe_json_path). Would fail if a rejected --json path got written to instead of stdout.
  - r16: covered by v11 (archive_install --include archive_integration). Currently RED on a pre-existing telemetry.app packaging defect unrelated to this ticket; the requirement's contract (no MatchError; structured runtime_load_failed JSON) is what the test asserts and is not regressed by this commit.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none. No realized_by bindings added; no requirement ids added/removed (16 before, 16 after); surface/decisions/ids preserved; spec-meta diff is status: draft->active only.
- Project verification: pass. mix spec.validate emits ZERO errors AND zero warnings for subject mutagen.cli (baseline was 12). mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean. mix test = 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded).

Verdict: PASS

Notes:
- Internal consistency confirmed: all given/when/then reshaped to YAML arrays (parses clean -- zero parse_error); the two bare-backtick when: entries (s14b, s14d, s15) are quoted to stay valid YAML; all 11 verification entries use target: (not command:); every requirement r1-r16 has a covering verification entry; status flipped to active and reflected in .spec/state.json.
- The full-corpus mix spec.validate reports 250 findings, but ALL belong to the 8 unmigrated subjects (e.g. scope_resolution, test_selection) -- zero reference cli.spec.md or subject mutagen.cli. Expected for Phase 1 per the ticket's per-subject Merge gate.
- v11 archive_integration is a known pre-existing failure (telemetry.app not bundled in the .ez, aborts at archive_install_test.exs:108). Out of scope for a spec-authoring ticket that edits no code; flagging for the phase that owns r16's packaging, not this one.

AUDIT: APPROVE
Session: 0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de.jsonl

Reasoning: Independently re-ran mix spec.validate — ZERO errors AND zero warnings reference subject mutagen.cli (the 250 corpus findings all belong to the 8 unmigrated subjects; none touch cli.spec.md), and .spec/state.json shows mutagen.cli status: active, so the contract bar is met. The diff is exactly 2 files (cli.spec.md + exempt generated state.json): no lib/**, no test/**, no other *.spec.md, no realized_by bindings — Out of Scope respected; requirement set is byte-identical (16 before, 16 after, no id added/removed/renamed) and every r1-r16 has a covering verification entry whose covers refs all resolve. The command:->target: rename is schema-correct (coverage.ex:180 / verifier.ex read target for kind: command) and execute: false is a first-class opt-out field (verifier.ex:1002), so v3/r8 is a legitimate declared-not-run, not a defect. v11/r16 RED is a pre-existing telemetry.app packaging defect on clean main (corroborated by independent auto-memory and the zero-code-touch diff) — out of this spec-authoring ticket's mandate; r16's statement (lines 275-300) correctly captures the MatchError-avoidance + structured runtime_load_failed contract regardless of the code's current red state. Follow-up: the telemetry.app .ez packaging defect blocking r16 should be filed against the phase that owns r16's packaging (mutagen-835.3 or a dedicated bug).
APPROVED (auditor APPROVE). Rebased onto epic (state.json regenerated for cli+pipeline), ff-merged into spec-led/bootstrap @ ae5a3c1. Closing per orchestrator sign-off.

title: migrate mutagen.cli to SpecLedEx schema (12 errors)
